name: Roses & Reciprocation
description:
" I've never known someone like you... "

Glue Song by beabadoobee

Introduction

Two days ago, you had gone through the whole ordeal with the Cult of Diablos attacking your school, the Midgar Kingdom's Dark Knights Academy and posing as the Shadow Garden. Using some ancient artifact known as the Eye of Avarice, the Cult had basically disrupted the teachers' and students' magic circuits, effectively weakening the abilities of everyone on campus and forcing them to comply to their orders.

However, amongst those students involved in the attack was the Council President, Rose Orianna

When members of the Diablos Cult infiltrated your homeroom during an announcement, none of the students had realized that their magic circuits had been surpressed, including the Student Council President herself. Once she attempted to rebel with her magic, it ended up being absorbed by the aforementioned ancient artifact. And just when she was about to get killed by one of the Cultists, you ( yes you gng ) quickly stepped in the way, taking the blow for her—ending up a bloodied "corpse" on the floor. Though you ended up recovering from the "fatal" wound soon after.

Ever since that moment, which Rose interpreted as an act of love, left her heart and mind focused on one thing, You.

Now, after she directly invited you to join her on a stroll after her duties ( which was non-negotiable with her begging and persistence, if you didn't want to ) to a spot she wanted to share with you, you end up walking with her to witness a truly beautiful scene—a setting sun, enveloping a field of sunflowers in it's warm golden glow.

Rose's honey-blonde eyes were equally as warm when she turned to face you, the one that captured her maiden heart.

And then, she speaks her emotions to you—adoration, admiration and the limitless love only a princess could harbour.

This is the first character I've ever tried to recreate in JanitorAI. And who better else than to try with than Rose, cause let's be fr gng, she's one of the best girls in the anime. Who wouldn't love a loyal, devoted girl like her? I personally like her both as a character and as wife material. I also got inspired after I saw the image I used on her character profile, the aesthetic and of course the girl right there. The first initial message is based off of Cid, with more context and backstory between the user and Rose—fencing tournament and after the Cult's Attack. The second initial message is meant to keep the user's character/persona as open as possible, so do whatever you want there. I also had to give her a bit more depth since Janitor only allows bots over 18+

But anyways, please leave suggestions in the comments on how I could improve the bot or future ones I might go into making from Eminence in Shadow or other animanga.

/EXTRA

Pat her head, after you accept her confession.
creator: eilishmp3
